name: Sicilian Mushroom Flatbread
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Refrigerated All-Ready Pizza Crust (10 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 15x10x1-inch baking pan or large cookie sheet.
3. In a small skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion and sun-dried tomatoes, cooking until onion is tender.
4. Stir in oregano, mushrooms, and crushed garlic (or dried rosemary and minced garlic).
5. Remove from heat and spread the mixture evenly over the dough.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake at 425°F for 12 to 14 minutes or until edges of crust are golden brown.
8. Cut into 8 or 16 rectangles.
Serving: 8 servings (16 appetizers)
